---
title: "Merna Saad"
description: "MSBA, UCSD Rady 2026"
image: "assets/Merna.png"
page-layout: full
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:merna.s.saad@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/merna-s-saad
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/merna-saad
---

## Current

- **M.S. Business Analytics**, UCSD Rady

---

## Work History

- **Bank of Egypt** | SVP, Strategic Venture Manager | [2020 - 2023]{.gold}
- **Corplease S.A.E** | Manager, Corporate & Credit | [2018 - 2020]{.gold}
- **Corplease S.A.E** | Senior Officer, Corporate & Credit | [2016 - 2018]{.gold}
- **Corplease S.A.E** | Officer, Corporate & Credit | [2014 - 2016]{.gold}

---

## Education

- **M.S. Business Analytics** | [UCSD Rady 2026]{.teal}
- **B.S. Architectural Engineering** | [American University in Cairo 2014]{.teal}
- **B.B.A. Finance** | [American University in Cairo 2014]{.teal}

---

## Academic Projects

- **Marketing Campaign Response Prediction** | [UCSD Rady Winter 2026]{.gold}
  <br>Logistic regression, random forest & XGBoost for campaign response modeling
- **FIFA 2026 World Cup Winner Prediction** | [UCSD Rady Fall 2025]{.gold}
  <br>Classification & ensemble methods on historical match data
- **Web Mining & Recommender Systems** | [UCSD Rady Fall 2025]{.gold}
  <br>Collaborative filtering & content-based recommender systems

```{=html}
<div class="open-badge" id="open-badge">Open to Work</div>

<div class="typing-tagline" id="tagline"></div>

<div class="skills-section">
  <div class="skill-category">
    <div class="skill-label">Languages</div>
    <div class="skill-pills">
      <span class="pill pill-navy">Python</span>
      <span class="pill pill-navy">SQL</span>
      <span class="pill pill-navy">Excel VBA</span>
      <span class="pill pill-navy">Git</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-category">
    <div class="skill-label">ML & Stats</div>
    <div class="skill-pills">
      <span class="pill pill-brass">Regression</span>
      <span class="pill pill-brass">Classification</span>
      <span class="pill pill-brass">Clustering</span>
      <span class="pill pill-brass">XGBoost</span>
      <span class="pill pill-brass">NLP</span>
      <span class="pill pill-brass">A/B Testing</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-category">
    <div class="skill-label">Tools</div>
    <div class="skill-pills">
      <span class="pill pill-brass-outline">Jupyter</span>
      <span class="pill pill-brass-outline">Tableau</span>
      <span class="pill pill-brass-outline">Plotly</span>
      <span class="pill pill-brass-outline">ETL Pipelines</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="scroll-indicator">
  <span class="scroll-text">Scroll</span>
  <div class="scroll-arrow"></div>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var leftCol = document.querySelector('.quarto-about-trestles .about-entity')
             || document.querySelector('.about-entity');
  var badge = document.getElementById('open-badge');
  var tagline = document.getElementById('tagline');
  var skills = document.querySelector('.skills-section');
  var links = leftCol ? leftCol.querySelector('.about-links') : null;
  var image = leftCol ? leftCol.querySelector('.about-image') : null;

  if (leftCol && badge) {
    if (image) {
      leftCol.insertBefore(badge, image);
    } else {
      leftCol.insertBefore(badge, leftCol.firstChild);
    }
  }
  if (leftCol && tagline) {
    if (links) {
      leftCol.insertBefore(tagline, links);
    } else {
      leftCol.appendChild(tagline);
    }
  }
  if (leftCol && skills) {
    leftCol.appendChild(skills);
  }

  const text = "Engineering mindset. Strategic vision. Data driven.";
  const el = document.getElementById('tagline');
  if (!el) return;
  let i = 0;
  function type() {
    if (i < text.length) {
      el.textContent += text.charAt(i);
      i++;
      setTimeout(type, 45);
    }
  }
  setTimeout(type, 800);
});
</script>
```
